name: Victory City International Holdings Limited
summary: Victory City International Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, produces and sells knitted fabrics, dyed yarns, and garment products. The company provides fabric knitting, bleaching, dyeing, and finishing services, as well as related subcontracting services. Its fabric products include jersey, double knit, fleece, jacquard, lacoste, rib, striped, velour, and polarfleece products. In addition, the company engages in the provision of management services; trading of knitted fabrics, dyed yarns, and garment products and accessories; and chemical mixing activities. It has operations in Hong Kong, Macau, the People's Republic of China, South Korea, the United States, Bangladesh, Taiwan, Singapore, Vietnam, Indonesia, the United Arab Emirates, Canada, India, Mexico, Thailand, Germany, and internationally. Victory City International Holdings Limited was founded in 1983 and is headquartered in Tuen Mun, Hong Kong.
